items.title: New website lets you identify your enemy in under 90 seconds using a patented Scapegoat Allocation Wheel
items.dek: The algorithm is clinically calibrated and emotionally guaranteed. It identified my enemy as IMMIGRANTS, then updated to SOMEONE DIFFERENT FROM YOU. Both are co
items.body: The algorithm is clinically calibrated and emotionally guaranteed. It identified my enemy as IMMIGRANTS, then updated to SOMEONE DIFFERENT FROM YOU. Both are correct. Neither is the point. Also the tactical vest is made in Taiwan and the freedom supplements are manufactured in China. submitted by /u/AwayRevenue1559 [link] [comments]

items.title: Colombia presidential runoff pits leftist senator against pro-Trump rival
items.dek: Left-wing senator Iván Cepeda will face Trump admirer Abelardo de la Espriella at the final ballot on 21 June.
items.body: Left-wing senator Iván Cepeda will face Trump admirer Abelardo de la Espriella at the final ballot on 21 June.
